name: WP-secapi-ci-gha-hardening
description: Harden GitHub Actions permission scopes and CI gate integrity: narrow id-token/issues permissions to the jobs that need them (F-024, F-127), add an auth/trigger guard to the @claude secret-backed agent path (F-119), frame untrusted PR metadata in CI prompts (F-129), make the review-verdict gate non-forgeable (F-132), and add an independent trigger guard to the secret-bearing mobile-maestro job (F-154). Files: .github/workflows/ (claude.yml, claude-code-review.yml, deploy.yml, mobile-maestro). OQ1 ruling: these GHA-permission findings stay in PRG-10 (permission-narrowing + gate-hardening, same files as F-119/F-132); PRG-14 keeps its structural F-151/F-157.
acceptanceCriteria: Each of F-024/119/127/129/132/154 remediated with file:line proof; CI permission scopes minimized to need; review-gate forgery negative-path test (red-green) for F-132; @claude trigger/auth guard tested (F-119).
riskImpact: P1: over-broad id-token:write/issues:write scopes, a forgeable review-verdict gate, and unguarded secret-bearing @claude/maestro triggers expose CI to privilege escalation and gate bypass on untrusted PRs.
bodyText:
Bundle brief — CI / GHA hardening
Rationale: GitHub Actions workflows over-grant id-token/issues permissions and the review-verdict gate is forgeable on untrusted PRs, exposing CI to privilege escalation and gate bypass. Strategy: narrow each permission to the job that needs it, add independent auth/trigger guards to secret-bearing jobs, frame untrusted PR metadata, and make the verdict gate non-forgeable. Scope: .github/workflows/ (claude.yml, claude-code-review.yml, deploy.yml, mobile-maestro); one PR. OQ1 ruling: these permission/gate findings stay in PRG-10; PRG-14 keeps structural F-151/F-157.
F-024 / F-127 — minimize id-token:write / issues:write to the jobs that need them
F-154 — independent trigger guard on the secret-bearing mobile-maestro job
F-119 — auth/trigger guard on the @claude secret-backed agent path (tested)
F-129 — frame untrusted PR metadata in CI prompts
F-132 — make the review-verdict gate non-forgeable (red-green negative-path test)
Acceptance Criteria: each of F-024/119/127/129/132/154 remediated with file:line proof; CI permission scopes minimized to need; review-gate forgery negative-path test (red-green) for F-132; @claude trigger/auth guard tested (F-119). Children 705/706 are absorbed provenance; lands as one PR.
